channels.notes: Paper headline. Lambda_UV stipulated, not derived from axioms.

channels.desc: Universal coupling (no dark-only) at the same beta_eff
channels.notes: Same arithmetic as (1). Channel name distinguishes the *embedding*: if baryons couple, beta=7.4e-21 still passes -- but only because Lambda_UV was tuned to MeV scale.

channels.desc: Universal coupling at Phase-3 cosmology posterior beta=0.107
channels.notes: HARD FAIL: |gamma-1|~2.3e-2 vs limit 2.3e-5 (1000x violation). Forces the dark-only embedding choice.

channels.desc: Sector-selective coupling: matter sector decoupled, beta_b=0
channels.notes: STRUCTURAL gamma=1 exact. Identical to PASS_TRIVIAL: any theory with beta_b=0 trivially passes. Dark-only embedding is an axiom-level *choice* (Foundation 5), not a derivation.
Reduces to (1) algebraically -- not an independent prediction.

channels.desc: Pure disformal coupling: g~ = g + B d_phi d_phi, A'=0
channels.notes: STRUCTURAL gamma=1 exact (Zumalacarregui-Koivisto-Bellini 2013). Schwarzschild solves the modified equations with auxiliary field frozen. Independent of beta. PASS_TRIVIAL.
Phase-3 posterior beta survives Cassini *if* Vainshtein screening active. Adds a screening axiom (cubic Galileon), not currently in SQMH foundations.
Literature ceiling from thin-shell argument. Adds a chameleon potential axiom not in SQMH foundations.
